productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Casual Black Shoes
description: Luxurious reinvention of the classic sneaker from numero uno for the cosmopolitan male. Minimal outer with powerful stitch detailing, styling the shoe into a sporty silhouette of perfection. These disctinctive shoes add an authentic sportswear accent to your ensemble. Wear this with a sweatshirt, jeans and a tee or a shirt. This NU pair cuts a dash to downtime dressing, while lending your outfit a relaxed vibe. Upper Synthetic leather upper with oerforations and dotted texturing Reinforced mesh overlays on the mouth and heel collar Central lacing systemwith a padded tongue Fabric lining Pull loop at the collar Midsole EVA midsole Outsole TPU outsole with overlapping terraced grooves Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
